name: O.R.C. Red Soldier Ant
description: The O.R.C. Red Soldier Ant is the militarized version of the Red Soldier Ant in Grounded 2. It keeps the same heavy guard role, but the O.R.C. network makes it far more aggressive and relentless.
behavior: It patrols MIX.R sites, relays, and anthill approaches like a containment unit. It behaves less like a forager and more like a sentry waiting for intruders.
interactionWithPlayer: It attacks as soon as it detects you and does not need colony aggro to become hostile. In groups, the chained bites can become overwhelming fast.
interactionWithCreatures: It usually advances alongside other O.R.C. units and fights any creature that crosses its patrol lanes or control nodes.
strategy: The safest plan is to isolate it and cleanly block its bite chains. The charged bite and stunning bite are its clearest punish windows, but do not let several soldiers pin you in place.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary: Bite: 37.5. 3-Bite Combo: 31.25. Charged Bite: 68.75. Stunning Bite: 37.5.

abilities.name: Bite
abilities.description: A quick direct bite used to keep pressure at close range.

abilities.name: 3-Bite Combo
abilities.description: It chains three bites in a row to punish players who mistime the first block.

abilities.name: Charged Bite
abilities.description: It pulls back briefly before lunging with a much heavier bite.

abilities.name: Stunning Bite
abilities.description: It has a longer tell and leaves the player exposed if the block timing is wrong.
